results.title: Dear Abby: He says he won’t get a vasectomy because he might want kids, but is that the real reason?
results.description: He was in total agreement on the no-kids thing, until the prospect of a vasectomy arose.

results.title: Almost as bad as Biden: Poll reveals Americans troubled by Trump in this same key area
results.description: Something that the president had made fun of his predecessor for.

results.title: Georgia Democrats renew push for prized early 2028 presidential primary
results.description: Party leaders are meeting this week to discuss the 2028 calendar. They're considering Georgia as an early primary state. But a state law makes it uncertain.

results.title: Lamont, Elliott Spar Over Taxes, Trump In Primary Debate
results.description: On the debate stage in New Haven Wednesday, Hamden State Rep. Josh Elliott accused Gov. Ned Lamont of being “too afraid of the federal government” and of not doing enough to keep ICE agents out of Connecticut.
